---
title: Test post
author: Keenan Roe
date: '2026-03-06'
slug: []
categories:
  - Test
tags:
  - R
image: "/static/images/iconsplan.png"
---

## Test post with Rmarkdown 

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
print("Hello this is a test post")
```
